prompt: Full-length candid editorial lifestyle photograph in a clean, warm, minimal Scandinavian-Mediterranean style (the relaxed 'Mikuta' aesthetic): soft natural daylight, warm neutral colour grade, film-like and understated, but with genuine character and atmosphere, not a blank studio wall. The woman is a NEW model, NOT the woman in the reference image: fair, softly and naturally sun-kissed skin with true-to-life healthy tone and absolutely no orange or fake-tan look; loose natural hair, relaxed candid pose, at ease. She is wearing the EXACT dress from the reference image: a deep red short A-line mini dress covered in evenly spaced small white polka dots in neat regular rows, with ruffled frill shoulder straps, a gently gathered scoop neckline with a small tie at the centre bust, a relaxed swing fit ending just above the knee, and side pockets. Keep this dress faithful to the reference, same red colour, same white polka-dot pattern, same ruffled straps and neckline, do not restyle or recolour it. Simple minimal flat sandals. Setting: a warm lime-washed wall in late-afternoon light with bold graphic palm-leaf shadows across it and a simple weathered wooden bench partly in frame. Keep it uncluttered and calm but with warmth and texture. One cohesive natural photograph, vertical full-length portrait, 35mm lens, shallow-ish depth of field, relaxed premium slow-fashion mood.
